differentials.name: Neurofibromatosis type 1: obstruction of canal of Schlemm by membranes / masses composed of aberrant mesodermal tissue
differentials.raw: Neurofibromatosis type 1: obstruction of canal of Schlemm by membranes / masses composed of aberrant mesodermal tissue

differentials.name: Ocular mesodermal dysplasia
differentials.raw: Ocular mesodermal dysplasia (eg, Axenfeld or Rieger anomalies)

context: =  HYDROPHTHALMOS = MEGOPHTHALMOS =  diffuse enlargement of eye in children ← increased intraocular pressure Cause: Pathophysiology: obstruction of canal of Schlemm located between cornea + iris → decreased resorption of aqueous humor (= anterior chamber fluid) → scleral distension √  uniformly enlarged globe without mass of round / oval / bizarre shape Rx:   goniotomy (increases the angle of anterior chamber); trabeculotomy (lysis of adhesions)
